title: Watch and Clock Repairers
description: Repair, clean, and adjust mechanisms of timing instruments, such as watches and clocks. Includes watchmakers, watch technicians, and mechanical timepiece repairers.

tasks.text: Clean, rinse, and dry timepiece parts, using solutions and ultrasonic or mechanical watch-cleaning machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust timing regulators, using truing calipers, watch-rate recorders, and tweezers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Reassemble timepieces, replacing glass faces and batteries, before returning them to customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble timepieces and inspect them for defective, worn, misaligned, or rusty parts, using loupes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Estimate repair costs and timepiece values.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace broken, damaged, or worn parts on timepieces, using lathes, drill presses, and hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test timepiece accuracy and performance, using meters and other electronic instruments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform regular adjustment and maintenance on timepieces, watch cases, and watch bands.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Order supplies, including replacement parts, for timing instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather information from customers about a timepiece's problems and its service history.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test and replace batteries and other electronic components.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record quantities and types of timepieces repaired, serial and model numbers of items, work performed, and charges for repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate parts for watches and clocks, using small lathes and other machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
